description_long: This object is a classic hot dog, featuring a plump, reddish-brown sausage nestled within a soft, lightly browned bun. The sausage is smooth and cylindrical, with a rounded, pleated end visible from the side. The bun is split lengthwise, cradling the sausage securely, and has a subtle gradient from a pale beige top to a slightly darker, toasted underside. There are no visible condiments or toppings, giving the hot dog a clean and simple appearance. The surface of both the bun and sausage appears smooth and slightly matte, with no visible grill marks or packaging. This hot dog would be a familiar sight at street food vendors, parks, or urban events.
description: A classic hot dog with a reddish-brown sausage in a soft, lightly browned bun, free of condiments or packaging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sausage nestled in the bun, with both ends of the bun visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded, pleated end of the sausage and the bun's split opening.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the sausage and bun from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the pleated sausage end and the bun's split, mirroring view 1.
